creator: dave@horsfall.org
text:
The documentation for ntpq(8), both web and disk, has some irritating spelling mistakes in the section under "Tally Codes".

"outlier" is spelled as "outlyer" twice.

"candidate" is spelled as "candidat".

I have flagged this as "Affects Many People" because there's probably quite a few pedantic people like me around.

Thanks.

-- Dave
